testcase.name: test_kernel_accepts_fp8[nan_to_num-e4m3fn]

failure.message: tvm.error.InternalError: Check failed: value <= bound (10000 vs. 448) : ValueError: Literal value 10000 exceeds maximum of float8_e4m3fn

testcase.failure: tests/test_elementwise_independent_fp8.py:67: in test_kernel_accepts_fp8 kernel = cls(dtype=dtype, **extra_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tileops/kernels/elementwise.py:2691: in __init__ self.init_config(config, tune) tileops/kernels/elementwise.py:2702: in init_config self._compiled_fn = self.kernel(cfg["threads"], cfg["num_per_thread"]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/jit/__init__.py:440: in __call__ kernel = self.compile(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/jit/__init__.py:374: in compile prim_func = self.get_tir(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/jit/__init__.py:298: in get_tir tir = self.func(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/language/eager/builder.py:1142: in __call__ return self.get_tir(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/language/eager/builder.py:1138: in get_tir self.p1_cache[p1_key] = self._build_tir_template(**kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/language/eager/builder.py:1106: in _build_tir_template return TirTemplate.from_lazy_style(self.orig_func.__name__, self.orig_func(*args, **kwargs)) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tileops/kernels/elementwise.py:2591: in kernel @T.prim_func ^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/language/eager/builder.py:1224: in prim_func return impl(func) if func is not None else impl ^^^^^^^^^^ ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/language/eager/builder.py:1222: in impl raise e ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/language/eager/builder.py:1214: in impl ir_gen.gen(builder)(**annot) tileops/kernels/elementwise.py:2600: in main pos_r = T.cast(posinf_val, out_dtype) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../_tool/tileops_op_test_venv_db4a9af2f48857c5/lib/python3.11/site-packages/tilelang/3rdparty/tvm/python/tvm/tir/generic.py:144: in cast return _ffi_api._cast(dtype, src, span) # type: ignore ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ python/tvm_ffi/cython/function.pxi:929: in tvm_ffi.core.Function.__call__ ??? <unknown>:0: in tvm::cast(tvm::runtime::DataType const&, tvm::PrimExpr, tvm::Span) ??? double, tvm::Span) ??? <unknown>:0: in tvm::FloatImm::FloatImm(tvm::runtime::DataType, double, tvm::Span) ??? <unknown>:0: in tvm::runtime::detail::LogFatal::Entry::Finalize() ??? E tvm.error.InternalError: Check failed: value <= bound (10000 vs. 448) : ValueError: Literal value 10000 exceeds maximum of float8_e4m3fn

testcase.name: test_masked_fill_e5m2_overflow_fill_value

failure.message: tvm.error.InternalError: Check failed: value <= support::kMaxFloat16 (100000 vs. 65504) : ValueError: Literal value 100000 exceeds maximum of float16

testcase.failure: tests/test_elementwise_independent_fp8.py:268: in test_masked_fill_e5m2_overflow_fill_value op = MaskedFillOp(N_total=n, dtype=dtype, fill_value=fill_value)
